equity.label: S&P 500 equity signal
equity.note: A 5-session drawdown adds pressure. A 5-session rally adds relief and can partially offset the composite score.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Inflation pressure reflects both the breakeven level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2026-01-22 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 21.10
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2026-01-22: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 21.10/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2026-01-22, the score printed 21.10/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and front-end rate pressure doing most of the work.
